title: Juice Polish & PWA
summary: Juice at 7/10 is the weakest metric. This day focuses on micro-interactions and visual feedback: gate placement animation (pop/scale), wire drawing preview with better curve, particle sparks on wire connections, breadboard texture, favicon, and PWA manifest for installability. Also adding achievement unlock sound.

tasks.description: Gate placement animation — when a gate is placed, it pops in with a brief scale-up animation. Gates should animate from 0 to full size with a bounce easing.
acceptance_criteria: New gates animate from small to full size on placement

tasks.description: Spark particles on wire connection — when a wire connects, spawn 8-12 small orange spark particles from the connection point that fly outward and fade.
acceptance_criteria: Spark particles appear at connection point when wire completes
8-12 particles with outward velocity and fade

tasks.description: Add favicon (⚡ emoji as canvas-generated favicon) and basic PWA manifest for installability
acceptance_criteria: manifest.json exists with app name and theme color
Game can be installed as PWA on mobile (Add to Home Screen)

tasks.description: Achievement unlock sound — play a special chime when an achievement unlocks
acceptance_criteria: Distinct chime plays when achievement toast appears
Sound is different from success jingle

rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
